name: Claude Projects
description: Claude projects including project ids, titles, labels, relative URLs, and project detail when the authenticated project API is available.

name.description: Display name shown in the Claude user menu.

plan.description: Current Claude plan label shown in the user menu.

organizationId.description: Active Claude organization id used for authenticated API requests.

projects.description: Projects collected from Claude, enriched with project detail when possible.

id.description: Project identifier parsed from the sidebar route when available.

title.description: Project title shown in the Claude sidebar.

href.description: Relative Claude route for the project.

label.description: Accessible label for the project entry, if present.

createdAt.description: Project creation timestamp if Claude returned one.

updatedAt.description: Project update timestamp if Claude returned one.

detail.description: Raw Claude project detail payload when fetched successfully.

fetchError.description: Error captured when Claude project detail could not be fetched.

source.description: How the data was collected for this export.

apiError.description: Top-level API error message when Claude project APIs were unavailable.
